name: zacatl-fastify-sqlite-monorepo
description: Full-stack monorepo: Fastify + SQLite backend with React frontend

scripts.stop:dev: (lsof -ti :8081; lsof -ti :5001; lsof -ti :5002) | sort -u | xargs -n 1 kill -9 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.dev: npm run stop:dev && (npm run backend:dev & npm run frontend:dev)
scripts.build: npm run backend:build && npm run frontend:build
scripts.clean: rm -rf apps/backend/dist apps/frontend/dist apps/backend/node_modules apps/frontend/node_modules node_modules
